text.title: Human-in-the-Loop Design Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Human-in-the-Loop Design output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: correction_capture missing (HITL with no learning loop)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: hitl_placement populated with a typed value
escalation_policy populated with a typed value
correction_capture populated with a typed value
queue_sla populated with a typed value
reviewer_rotation populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
